name: Branston
description:
Branston lies on the outskirts of Burton and has a wide range of traditional modern housing as well as business premises.

Branston Golf Club is a well known local sporting venue with a large health and fitness centre and entertainment facilities. Nearby Tatenhill has its own airfield used by small aircraft and helicopters.

Rangemore is extremely rural and if you blink you could miss it although it is home to a thriving garden centre. On the sporting front, the area is the site of the planned national centre for footballing excellence.
